name: Hanging Travel Organizer Pink - Brightroom™
description:
Sort your travel essentials and keep them safe with this Hanging Travel Organizer from Brightroom™. This pink travel organizer features a zippered transparent pouch to hold your toiletries, makeup, and other essentials, and also has a zippered mesh pocket for extra storage. It comes with a metal hook to securely pack the bag, which can also be hung on a towel rack or door knob for ease of use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
